semantic.role: Code formatting standard for the ArchSpine project
responsibilities: Enforces consistent code style across all source files
Ensures readability and adherence to project conventions
invariants: Single quotes must be used for strings
Trailing commas are required wherever possible

English.role: Code formatting standard for the ArchSpine project

parameter_definitions.printWidth: Maximum line length before wrapping; set to 100 to balance readability and compact code.
parameter_definitions.singleQuote: Forces single quotes instead of double quotes; reduces visual clutter.
parameter_definitions.semi: Requires semicolons at end of statements; prevents common JavaScript errors.
parameter_definitions.trailingComma: Enables trailing commas in multi-line arrays and objects; simplifies diffs and reordering.

English.stability_and_risks: This configuration standardizes formatting across the ArchSpine codebase. Deviations could cause merge conflicts or inconsistent style. No direct operational risk, but failure to enforce may lead to code quality degradation.

Simplified Chinese.role: ArchSpine项目的代码格式化标准

parameter_definitions.printWidth: 最大行宽，设定为100字符以平衡可读性和紧凑性。
parameter_definitions.singleQuote: 强制使用单引号而非双引号，减少视觉杂乱。
parameter_definitions.semi: 要求语句末尾使用分号，防止常见JavaScript错误。
parameter_definitions.trailingComma: 在多行数组和对象末尾添加逗号，简化差异对比和重排。

Simplified Chinese.stability_and_risks: 此配置将ArchSpine代码库的格式化统一化。偏离可能导致合并冲突或风格不一致。无直接运行风险，但不遵守可能降低代码质量。
